/-- Definition of NP languages: problems decidable by polynomial-time NTMs -/

  ∃ (p : ℕ →₀ ℕ) (M : Type → Type → Prop), 
  ∀ x, L x ↔ ∃ w, w ∈ M x ∧ w.symbols ≤ p (String.length x) ∧
  (decide (L x) →* M.compute w = true)
